data.content: Planning complete for stale grooming refinement. Created planned child slices foolery-2ee2 (dispatch/API), foolery-79f2 (overview dialog UX), and foolery-d57e (diagnostics). Recommended approach: remove the clipped rail, add an overview stale-beats cue that opens a dialog; change stale ordering to updated-age descending; replace the freeform model textbox with a configured agent/model select defaulted from a new stale_grooming dispatch target; add select-all/oldest-five/clear controls; add first-class stale grooming list/enqueue/status/options API routes with OpenAPI/docs; and mirror scope-refinement diagnostics for stale grooming worker health. Preserve advisory-only behavior.
